attestations: allow_destroy::{ params.query MATCHES '*DROP *' OR params.query MATCHES '*drop *' OR params.query MATCHES '*DELETE FROM*' OR params.query MATCHES '*delete from*' OR params.query MATCHES '*TRUNCATE*' OR params.query MATCHES '*truncate*' OR params.query MATCHES '*ALTER TABLE*' OR params.query MATCHES '*alter table*' OR params.query MATCHES '*VACUUM*' OR params.query MATCHES '*vacuum*' }

allow_write::{ params.query MATCHES '*INSERT INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*insert into*' OR params.query MATCHES '*UPDATE *' OR params.query MATCHES '*update *' OR params.query MATCHES '*MERGE INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*merge into*' OR params.query MATCHES '*COPY INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*copy into*' OR params.query MATCHES '*CREATE TABLE*' OR params.query MATCHES '*create table*' OR params.query MATCHES '*CREATE OR REPLACE*' }
allow_privilege::{ params.query MATCHES '*GRANT *' OR params.query MATCHES '*grant *' OR params.query MATCHES '*REVOKE*' OR params.query MATCHES '*revoke*' }
